ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family embracing.  The two adult women will have arms around each other and the two girls. The girls will have their arms around each other.  The movement will be gentle and loving, reflecting the warmth of family. Frame 1 will show the family in a hug, with arms slightly higher. Frame 2 will show a more relaxed version of the hug. Frame 3 will show the family embracing more tightly. The movements are designed to be fluid, reflecting the natural ebb and flow of affection.

frames.beat: family embraces warmly, arms held close
the hug tightens, a moment of shared affection
a gentle squeeze, drawing closer together
